text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan, do you have any plans for our next<n>day off?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll be training, working out, and<n>building
some muscle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... okay. Be careful not to get any<n>injuries then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait... Did you want to invite me out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-no... I just... I was thinking we<n>haven't
hung out in a while, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, why don't we go see a movie?<n>There's one
I've been wanting to see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I'll do it on my next day off! Now<n>the
movie is all I can think about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well that didn't take much convincing...<n>haha.
Okay, movie it is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'll reserve our tickets. I'll make sure<n>we get
the best seats!
